| I just stepped off the debate stage, guys, and I wanted to take a second to shoot you a note.

I'm so proud of how this debate went. Florida deserves better than Marco Rubio's absenteeism and support for Donald Trump. I can't wait to have the chance to show up and work hard for our state in the Senate.

But we have only **4 hours** left until tonight's big deadline, and we still have $5,467 left to raise. [**Can you give $5 if I made you proud tonight?**](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2da7/738133e4/329bd8d7/7f856e13/3233216815/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme161017pm3?refcode=pme161017pm3_m&recur_weekly=true&amount=10")

Thanks for being on my team,
Patrick

|

name: Natalie Baur
subject: Wow. Rob just won the second debate!
body:
| Peter --

Rob and failed former Governor Ted Strickland just finished their debate in Columbus -- and **Rob won decisively**! Tonight's debate highlighted the differences between Rob and Ted Strickland. Rob is getting results for Ohio, passing over 45 bills into law, including efforts to combat Ohio’s addiction epidemic and fight back against human trafficking. **Ted Strickland is growing increasingly desperate as National Democrats abandon his campaign** and he fails to defend his record as governor when Ohio lost 350,000 jobs and ranked 48th in job creation**.** During his 12 years in Congress, he didn't pass a single bill into law! **But Hillary Clinton and the Democrats are going to spend millions of dollars over the next 22 days right here in Ohio to turn out their voters.** **🚨 🚨 Please donate what you can to help us cross the finish line: 🚨 🚨** **➡️[Click here to donate $25! Donate >>>](https://www.robportman.com/rob_won?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=post_debate2&n=1)**
**➡️[Click here to donate $50! Donate >>>](https://www.robportman.com/rob_won?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=post_debate2&n=2)**
**➡️[Click here to donate $100! Donate >>>](https://www.robportman.com/rob_won?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=post_debate2&n=3)** With only three weeks left until Election Day, _**we can't take anything for granted.**_ Last week, early voting began and it’s vital that we hit our budget so that we can implement our plans to get voters to the polls to vote for Rob. [**We need to raise $25,000 in order to fund our plans**](https://www.robportman.com/rob_won?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=post_debate2&n=4). Will you help? This race could determine which party holds the Senate Majority -- and we have to do our part. **[Please consider donating today](https://www.robportman.com/rob_won?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=post_debate2&n=5)!** Sincerely,

Natalie Baur
Finance Director [](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Frobportman&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=post_debate2&n=6)[](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2Frobportman&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=post_debate2&n=7)[

](https://www.robportman.com/rob_won?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=post_debate2&n=8 "Donate Here!")

---

name: tom@dscc.org
subject: You deserve this, Friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
With the final FEC deadline of this race approaching, I wanted to extend an exclusive opportunity to our top supporters... [](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dscc-otr2?refcode=DPE-20161017-Tom_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=350,235,200,135,100&amount=35")
---
Friend -- Two years ago, our hopes of taking back the Senate were very much up in the air.

Today, we're 22 days from a potentially historic election, with Democrats in strong positions from Nevada to New Hampshire. And while there's plenty left to do, I've never felt more optimistic.

Every Democrat made that remarkable turnaround possible -- by stepping up at critical deadlines, signing petitions to hold Republicans accountable, or funding crucial campaigns to keep momentum in our favor. **We would not be where we are without you.** That's why I wanted to extend a special opportunity, Friend. [**Contribute $35**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dscc-otr1?refcode=DPE-20161017-Tom_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=200,135,75,35,25&amount=200") by Wednesday's deadline to become an On-the-Record donor and get a personalized Certificate of Recognition. It's our way of saying thanks to our top supporters -- and your way of showing everyone the role you played in taking back the Senate!
| [****](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dscc-otr1?refcode=DPE-20161017-Tom_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=200,135,75,35,25&amount=200")
---
There's no better way to show your support for a Democratic Senate. Not only will you be an On-the-Record donor, but you'll have a one-of-a-kind keepsake that shows everyone you did your part for a progressive future.

And best of all, you'll provide critical support for our final push before Election Day -- from advertising to voter contact to turnout efforts.

**But with the final FEC deadline of this race on Wednesday, time 's running out to get your name on the record, Friend. Don't miss out -- pitch in now to fuel our final push and receive your exclusive Certificate of Recognition!**

**[Pitch in $35 IMMEDIATELY>>](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dscc-otr1?refcode=DPE-20161017-Tom_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=200,135,75,35,25&amount=35")**

**[Or donate another amount.](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dscc-otr1?refcode=DPE-20161017-Tom_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=200,135,75,35,25&amount=35")**

Thanks,
Tom Lopach
DSCC Executive Director

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values.

If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954eb4f/2b07114c/773fefa7/73bc0326/2570284835/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/take-an-email-break?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954eb4f/2b07114c/773fefa7/73bc0321/2570284835/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-disclaimer"). Together, we're going to take back the Senate in November, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954eb4f/2b07114c/773fefa7/73bc0320/2570284835/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/content/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). We greatly appreciate your continued support. Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.

Our race in New Hampshire is practically guaranteed to decide Senate control and the future of the Supreme Court, and the stakes for electing Governor Hassan just got a whole lot higher:
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdbac/2a380d31/160c32a5/fc570d/2939199042/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX3Nlbl9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYxMDE3X21jY2Fpbl92MSIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20161017_mccain_v1&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")
If Washington Republicans hold on to the Senate majority, they will continue their blockade against any Supreme Court nominee that Democrats put forward.
**Team, winning back a Democratic Senate is the ONLY way to end this obstructionism and ensure that our next Supreme Court justices work for everyone, not just those at the top.**
The path to the Senate majority runs through New Hampshire, and with recent polls showing us locked in a dead heat, Maggie needs you to give $3 or more directly to her campaign right now. **This is urgent, everyone:[Donate $3 or whatever you can to help elect Maggie, win back the Senate, and secure the future of the Supreme Court.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdbac/2a380d31/160c32a5/fc570d/2939199042/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX3Nlbl9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYxMDE3X21jY2Fpbl92MSIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20161017_mccain_v1&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")**

name: Jeff Weaver
subject: Bernie-backed candidates vs. Billionaire super PAC
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
body:
#
Four candidates endorsed by Bernie Sanders are facing millions of dollars in attacks by a billionaire-funded super PAC. With the final FEC fundraising deadline of the election on Wednesday, there's never been a more critical time to fight back.
[**Split a $3 contribution between Rick Nolan, Morgan Carroll, Tom Nelson, and Zephyr Teachout to help them fight against this billionaire-funded super PAC.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bernie-candidates?refcode=em161017-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bernie-candidates?refcode=em161017-full")
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bernie-candidates?refcode=em161017-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bernie-candidates?refcode=em161017-full")**
Sisters and Brothers,
A super PAC that gets a lot of its money from hedge fund billionaires is spending tens of millions of dollars on about 30 races for Congress. These billionaires want to buy seats in Congress for a pretty simple reason: they want people in office who will fight to expand corporate tax breaks, oppose efforts to raise the minimum wage, and to pass disastrous trade deals.
There's a lot of money at stake for these billionaires. They could get tens of millions of dollars in profits if Congress passes the Trans-Pacific Partnership. Who knows how much money they could save if they don't have to pay women for equal work.
That's why the billionaire class likes investing money in these races for Congress. It's a little bit of money for them, and if they win, it means much bigger profits down the line.
**Four candidates endorsed by Bernie Sanders are facing down millions of dollars in spending by this billionaire-funded super PAC.** The super PAC is buying TV commercials, digital ads, and even putting organizers on the ground to talk to voters.
Our small-dollar contributions can fight back, but we need to do so before Wednesday's final FEC fundraising deadline of the campaign.
[**Rick Nolan, Morgan Carroll, Tom Nelson, and Zephyr Teachout need your help today. Please split a $3 contribution between them before Wednesday's final FEC fundraising deadline.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bernie-candidates?refcode=em161017-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bernie-candidates?refcode=em161017-full")
We believe that there's a different way our democracy should work. Billionaires and special interests shouldn't be able to pour unlimited amounts of money into the political process to help build their profits.
We've proven that it's possible to take on the political establishment and do very well when you have a grassroots movement and small-dollar contributions powering campaigns. These candidates are up against millions of dollars from a single super PAC, but they have the backing of Bernie Sanders -- and now they need you.
[**Morgan Carroll**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bernie-candidates?refcode=em161017-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bernie-candidates?refcode=em161017-full") is running for Congress in Colorado. As a leader in the state senate, she refused to meet with lobbyists about pending legislation. She'll help fight climate change, take on corruption, and be a strong advocate for working families.
[**Rick Nolan**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bernie-candidates?refcode=em161017-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bernie-candidates?refcode=em161017-full") is a strong progressive serving in Congress in Minnesota. Rick's worked against disastrous trade deals and fought to protect and expand Social Security and Medicare. Now he's running against a millionaire CEO who wants to buy a seat in Congress, and we need to help Rick win.
[**Zephyr Teachout's**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bernie-candidates?refcode=em161017-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bernie-candidates?refcode=em161017-full") opponent is a former lobbyist for a fracking pipeline who voted against equal pay for women four times. Zephyr wants to get big banks to start lending to farmers and small businesses again, and will fight the effects of climate change. Her work on political corruption was cited in the Citizens United decision, and she'll get big money out of politics if she's in Congress.
[**Tom Nelson**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bernie-candidates?refcode=em161017-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bernie-candidates?refcode=em161017-full") fought against tax breaks for a paper mill that shut down and worked to get the workers re-hired. He's running for Congress in Wisconsin on a platform of fighting for working families, fair pay, and stopping disastrous trade deals.
Morgan, Rick, Zephyr, and Tom all have the same super PAC trying to defeat them. Together, we can show the power of our movement and help them win.
[**Split a $3 contribution to the campaigns of Morgan Carroll, Rick Nolan, Zephyr Teachout, and Tom Nelson to fight against billionaire-funded super PACs trying to buy our democracy.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bernie-candidates?refcode=em161017-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bernie-candidates?refcode=em161017-full")
Thank you for all you do.
In solidarity,
Jeff Weaver
Team Bernie
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bernie-candidates?refcode=em161017-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bernie-candidates?refcode=em161017-full")**

PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
603 2ND ST, NE
WASHINGTON, DC, 20002

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a 501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are made to support Our Revolution's general mission and are not designated for any specific activity.
603 2nd St NE, Washington, DC 20002

If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/").

name: Lucinda Guinn, EMILY's List
subject: ③ House women who need our help >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by EMILY's List [www
body:
| [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c0a11/24c69fd9/e5c3522/18eae8ab/837171504/VEsH/ "https://www.emilyslist.org/donate?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WPEFCV40N_digital_email_20161017_HouseFR_n-all&source=WPEFCV40N_digital_email_20161017_HouseFR_n-all")
---

| | Hi there,

Three of our House candidates are in serious need of a boost right now -- and I know this community can deliver for them.

**Monica Vernon** is running to defeat incumbent Republican Rod Blum in Iowa's First Congressional District. Blum is one of the most vulnerable incumbents in the House, but Monica is down in the polls 38-45 percent with 16 percent of voters undecided. Monica needs the resources to sway those undecided voters her way.

**Zephyr Teachout** is running for a seat left open after a Republican incumbent retired in New York's 19th Congressional District. Zephyr is just ONE point behind her Republican opponent, former state Assemblyman John Faso, in the polls: 42-43 percent.

**Pramila Jayapal** is running for Washington State's Seventh Congressional District. She did well in the primaries, but there are many more voters in the general election that Pramila will need to reach before they cast their ballots.

**[Give Monica, Zephyr, and Pramila a last burst of momentum to win-- 100% of your donation will go directly to their campaigns.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c0a11/24c69fd9/e5c3522/18eae8a4/837171504/VEsE/ "https://www.emilyslist.org/donate/page/20161017_email_House?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Give+Monica+Zephyr+and+Pramila+a+last+bu&utm_campaign=WPEFCV40N_digital_email_20161017_HouseFR_n-all&source=WPEFCV40N_digital_email_20161017_HouseFR_n-all")**

Monica can absolutely win her race. _Roll Call_ has consistently listed Blum as one of the most vulnerable House incumbents, and Monica has been running a campaign highlighting her record of getting things done on the Cedar Rapids City Council. But Blum has a serious cash advantage, and Monica needs to catch up if she's going to finish strong in these last few weeks.

Zephyr's district is a huge pick-up opportunity for Democrats, and it's listed as a toss-up by _Cook Political Report_. Zephyr is a strong progressive, but she needs our help to win this race.

Pramila has been a leader on immigration policy and voter engagement for years. Her perspective is sorely needed in Congress now, but this isn't an easy race to win. She needs every bit of support we can give her.

**Donate $3 or more to help elect Monica, Zephyr, and Pramila. 100% of your donation will go directly to their campaigns:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Momentum-To-Win](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c0a11/24c69fd9/e5c3522/18eae8a5/837171504/VEsF/ "https://www.emilyslist.org/donate/page/20161017_email_House?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgMomentumToWin&utm_campaign=WPEFCV40N_digital_email_20161017_HouseFR_n-all&source=WPEFCV40N_digital_email_20161017_HouseFR_n-all")**

Thanks,

Lucinda Guinn
Vice President of Campaigns, EMILY's List

[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c0a11/24c69fd9/e5c3522/18eae8a6/837171504/VEsC/ "https://www.emilyslist.org/donate/page/20161017_email_House?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=WPEFCV40N_digital_email_20161017_HouseFR_n-all&source=WPEFCV40N_digital_email_20161017_HouseFR_n-all")

name: HillaryClinton.com
subject: No guarantees
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 2
body:
What John McCain said | | Derek --

Doing our jobs and helping Hillary win this race on November 8th is no guarantee of progress for the next four years.

For proof, look no further than what Senator John McCain said on a radio show this morning:

_"I promise you that we will be united against any Supreme Court nominee that Hillary Clinton, if she were president, would put up...I promise you. This is where we need the majority."_

Republican senators have spent months blocking President Obama’s Supreme Court nominee and making the bogus argument that the next president should be the one to choose the next justice.

Now, confronted with the possibility that the next president will be Hillary, they're closing ranks, apparently to keep the Court understaffed in perpetuity.

So today, we're going to do something about that. We're investing $6 million in seven important battleground states with key down-ballot races -- in part because we want to win a new majority in the Senate. And by the way, Arizona, where John McCain is on the ballot, just happens to be one of those states.

**We need Hillary’s best supporters to be part of this, Derek. Will you chip in before Wednesday’s critical deadline to help?** | **You’re one of our most committed supporters. If you've saved your payment information, your donation will go through immediately:

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: the stakes of tomorrow's debate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
Will you show the country you're still fighting? |
* * *
Please find a special message from one of our advertisers, Trump Make America Great Again Committee.
* * *
---
[](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/38195542:WXcECNu0N:m:1:876315805:713308B0382293DB33B82D51DFC073C2:r)
Peter,

Either we win this election or we lose our country.

I want you to know that we will end this election by fighting as hard as we can.

I promise to get up on that stage tomorrow and fight for the American people. I promise to give it my all.

Tomorrow is not only my final debate with Hillary. It's also the FINAL FEC deadline of the entire election. And just like the first two debates, my son, Eric, is once again going to give me a list of every single supporter who stepped up at this critical moment right.

[**Please make a contribution of $100, $65, $50, $35, $20, $15, or $5 before the FINAL FEC deadline TOMORROW NIGHT to show the country that you 're committed to the fight to Make America Great Again!**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/38195542:WXcECNu0N:m:1:876315805:713308B0382293DB33B82D51DFC073C2:r)

By making a contribution of any amount, you will be officially showing your support for this great movement.

I'm truly humbled and honored by the support we've received from so many grassroots donors over the past few months.

It reminds me just how important this election is to the future of our country.

**And when Eric shows me the list of every supporter who stepped up before the FINAL FEC deadline of our election, I will be reminded once again who I 'm really fighting for -- YOU, the American people.**

Now please step up before the FINAL FEC deadline -- the night of our final debate against Crooked Hillary Clinton.

[**Please contribute $100, $65, $50, $35, $20, $15, or $5 before the FINAL FEC deadline.**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/38195542:WXcECNu0N:m:1:876315805:713308B0382293DB33B82D51DFC073C2:r)

Thank you and God bless you,

[](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/38195542:WXcECNu0N:m:1:876315805:713308B0382293DB33B82D51DFC073C2:r)

Donald J. Trump

subject: The race depends on tomorrow night
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
Get your name on the list I hand my father before his FINAL debate. |

Friend, Tomorrow night’s deadline is your last chance of the entire election to get your name on our official FEC report. I will be giving my father a list of everyone who stepped up to make a contribution at this critical moment in our campaign. The FEC deadline is not until 11:59 PM, but I’d love to tell my father that we already hit our fundraising goal just BEFORE he even sets foot on the debate stage. Seeing the contributions made by grassroots donors truly lifts his spirits. Please contribute $100, $65, $35, $20, $15, or even $3 before 8 PM EST to help us CRUSH our goal before the FEC deadline, and you’ll get your name on the list of supporters I give him before he takes the stage. My father loves our small-dollar machine, because it perfectly represents our movement. I mean it. During the second debate, he even took a moment to mention how proud he is of our grassroots donors -- and that our average contribution is only $61. Our movement is powered by the hard-working American men and women that have been abandoned by our politicians for decades. While Hillary calls you deplorable, my father calls you a patriot. And tomorrow night, he’s going to make that simple fact clear to EVERY SINGLE VOTER across America. Hillary represents the corrupt, stale status quo that has contempt for the hard-working Americans that make this country run. Our campaign is a movement OF, FOR, and BY the PEOPLE. Now please make a contribution of whatever you can before 8 PM EST tonight. Thank you, Eric Trump CONTRIBUTE $100

name: Team Koster
subject: What about the undecided voters?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Koster for Missouri, Gary Mallory, Treasurer
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/8775000660241680384/7014780331987699712?utm_campaign=fld_volunt_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=koster&ms=em16161018fldvoluntgqacttk&refcode=em16161018fldvoluntgqacttk)

Hey,

In just three weeks, voters across Missouri will vote for their next governor.

But today, there are still thousands of voters who haven't decided which candidate will get their support. That's why over these final three weeks, our team will be working overtime to talk to as many undecided voters as possible about Chris Koster's vision for Missouri's future -- and they need your help to reach everyone.

**Will you join the hundreds of volunteers across the state by volunteering to reach out to undecided voters before Election Day?**

[**Yes, I 'm ready to help in my community!**](https://act.myngp.com/el/8775000660241680384/7014780331987699712?utm_campaign=fld_volunt_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=koster&ms=em16161018fldvoluntgqacttk&refcode=em16161018fldvoluntgqacttk)

We won't win this race without a strong grassroots network of support. By volunteering now, you can help make sure every Missouri voter knows the clear differences between Chris Koster and Eric Greitens before they go to the polls on November 8th.

It doesn't matter if you have never volunteered before or if you're an old pro. We'll give you the tools you need to make a difference in this election -- and to have a lot of fun doing it.

**These last three weeks are critical.[Sign up to volunteer today, bring a friend, and together, we will move Missouri forward.](https://act.myngp.com/el/8775000660241680384/7014780331987699712?utm_campaign=fld_volunt_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=koster&ms=em16161018fldvoluntgqacttk&refcode=em16161018fldvoluntgqacttk)**

Thank you,

Team Koster

---
Hey, did you watch last night's debate?

We couldn't be prouder of Katie for her debate performance last night, laying out her progressive vision for Pennsylvania and holding Pat Toomey accountable for his failed policies and spineless, false attacks.

[**Are you proud of Katie 's performance, too? Then let her know by pitching in $5 or more to her campaign today, when it matters most >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/1448508859088896000/939871335515947008?refcode=e20161018&refcode2=e20161018nd&amount=25)

Today, we only have three weeks left, but a LOT can happen in that time. _Politico_ just reported that **Republicans like Toomey are BEGGING their big donors for more money** to take on Dems in these final weeks of the election.

In a tied race like this one -- where poll after poll has Katie within the margin of error -- _that could be the difference-maker!_

Don't let them beat us at the last minute -- [**Pitch in to now to show that you 're ready to win >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/1448508859088896000/939871335515947008?refcode=e20161018&refcode2=e20161018nd&amount=25)

Go time,

There are only 21 days left in this race, and the polls are in a virtual tie. Katie is fighting for working families in PA -- but we're up against major special interest spending. Can you make a grassroots donation today to help Katie win this race and take back the Senate?
**Chip in $5 today. Thank you.**

name: =?UTF-8?Q?Donald=20Trump=20Jr=2E?=
subject: For your eyes only – Election Day Information
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
All we need now is your support for this final push to victory on November 8th . |

Friend, Only 21 days left. But you can rest assured because we have everything in place to win including the absolute best campaign team to implement our Election Day strategy. We’re now just missing one item to bring it all together – you. All we need now is your support for this final push to victory on November 8th. So please join our team today by donating $35, $50, or $100 to make sure our Get-Out-The-Vote Plans are fully funded. Crooked Hillary and the liberal elites have been boasting for weeks that their ground game is superior to ours. THAT’S PLAIN NONSENSE! That’s as false as her claim that she “lost” all of those classified emails. So we need to make sure we beat her on November 8th, and not by a little bit, but by huge numbers. name: Eric Trump
subject: It all comes down to tomorrow night
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
Get your name on the list I hand my father before his FINAL debate. |
[](http://trk.listelixr.net/c/4/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjE2MjkyLTk5MGM2NzMyZmRmNTQxNGViZmY3ZTA5OTBiNjRkMDNh%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMjgyNTQ5Mjg%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%&K=-FUcwjarlCH3fQ3c0rzRDw)

Friend,

My father is truly honored and humbled by the grassroots support that powers our campaign.

During the second debate, he even took a moment to praise and thank the hard-working men and women who've made generous contributions to our campaign. He called attention to our average contribution of $61.

That's why I always make it a point to show my father a list of supporters who made a contribution just before his debates against Hillary.

And this time, the debate falls on our FINAL FEC deadline of the entire campaign. When I give him the list tomorrow night, I'd love to also be able to tell him that we already hit our fundraising goal BEFORE he even sets foot on the debate stage.

[**Please contribute $100, $65, $35, $20, $15, or even $3 before tomorrow night to help us CRUSH our goal before the FEC deadline, and you 'll get your name on the list of supporters I give him before he takes the stage.**](http://trk.listelixr.net/c/4/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjE2MjkyLTk5MGM2NzMyZmRmNTQxNGViZmY3ZTA5OTBiNjRkMDNh%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMjgyNTQ5Mjg%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3A%&K=6DVnqQswFPdghCV1Fttkww)

My father loves our small-dollar machine, because it perfectly represents our movement.

Our movement is powered by the hard-working American men and women that have been abandoned by our politicians for decades.

While Hillary calls you deplorable, my father calls you a patriot.

And tomorrow night, he's going to make that simple fact clear to EVERY SINGLE VOTER across America. Hillary represents the corrupt, stale status quo that has contempt for the hard-working Americans that make this country run.

Our campaign is a movement OF, FOR, and BY the PEOPLE.

[**Now please make a contribution of whatever you can before tomorrow night.**](http://trk.listelixr.net/c/4/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjE2MjkyLTk5MGM2NzMyZmRmNTQxNGViZmY3ZTA5OTBiNjRkMDNh%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMjgyNTQ5Mjg%3AZmFsc2U%3AMg%3A%&K=HxQojjy8maV87PAnMyEe-w)

Thank you,

Eric Trump

**[CONTRIBUTE NOW](http://trk.listelixr.net/c/4/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjE2MjkyLTk5MGM2NzMyZmRmNTQxNGViZmY3ZTA5OTBiNjRkMDNh%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMjgyNTQ5Mjg%3AZmFsc2U%3AMw%3A%&K=QsV9A_oWlqOab1zMvZyrcw)**

Contributions to the Trump Make America Great Again Committee are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

name: Steve Bullock
subject: I just want to say:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Steve Bullock - Democrat, P
body:
---
Friend,

I can't tell you how much I'm looking forward to not bombarding you with fundraising emails all the time.

But **we 're continuing to get hugely outspent in this campaign**. We're just three weeks from Election Day and thousands of Montanans have already started voting. **[Will you chip in $15?](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=f%2F4Bm0Z4ZZQ5gU7h7jP%2FCOkc1uPKEGi5)**

Right now, my opponent is using his millions to try to paint a picture of Montana that just isn't true. **He's trying to tear down our state to make the case for his candidacy** \-- when in reality unemployment is down, wages are up and more people are working than ever before.

**Tomorrow at midnight is the last big fundraising deadline before the election.** I'm asking you to help send a message that Montana is not a place where millionaires can just pump money into peddling misleading information to buy the governor's office.

I want to say again how much I appreciate the outpouring of support. Quite frankly, I'm amazed by the number of grassroots online donations we've seen over the course of this campaign. **But right now we 're still $2,087 away from our goal -- [will you make one more contribution of $15?](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=wDh%2BocyQ8erNjkEnBXafkekc1uPKEGi5)**

Thanks so much,
Steve Bullock ****
---

If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=dYanrYdmgEVAt2W98GhWYukc1uPKEGi5).

Helena MT 59624 United States

It's a coin toss if we'll be able to elect a champion for families, Governor Maggie Hassan, or be stuck with a rubber stamp for corporate special interests, Kelly Ayotte. It's a roll of the dice if we'll take back the Senate majority from the GOP. It's even odds if we'll have a Supreme Court that works for everyone.
**The only thing that's going to move this race is grassroots support from you, so we can get Maggie's message out to your friends and neighbors.[Please give $3 or more now so that we can get the word out, elect Maggie, take back the Senate, and secure the future of the Supreme Court.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdba2/2a380d31/1607ecb3/fc558d/2578909830/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX3Nlbl9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYxMDE4X0ZpdmVUaGlydHlFaWdodF9uaC1uZCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20161018_FiveThirtyEight_nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")**

clean_body: "" "" "" Look at these numbers -- the race that will determine Senate control is a total statistical deadlock! It's a coin toss if we'll be able to elect a champion for families, Governor Maggie Hassan, or be stuck with a rubber stamp for corporate special interests, Kelly Ayotte. It's a roll of the dice if we'll take back the Senate majority from the GOP. It's even odds if we'll have a Supreme Court that works for everyone. The only thing that's going to move this race is grassroots support from you, so we can get Maggie's message out to your friends and neighbors. "" In a year as wild as this one, it's hard to predict what the future holds. But, what we do know is that every dollar you give will get us closer to winning this race and electing Maggie, so please give now: If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: "" "" "" "" -- Maggie for NH Polling Team ""

Donald J. Trump

name: Cecile Richards, Planned Parenthood Federal PAC
subject: Will you join me?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
The attacks that we have seen and heard in this election cycle are unprecedented. |

>
> Friend,
>
> Women's health care and rights are on the line and on the ballot this year. The attacks that we have seen and heard in this election cycle are unprecedented.
>
> That's why I'm proud to support our progressive champion Chris Van Hollen, who has spent his entire time in public service fighting to protect women's rights and access to health care -- and advancing an agenda that lifts us all up.
>
> In this volatile year, we need to stand shoulder-to-shoulder with our allies and leaders in the fight for our future.
>
> **[I'm asking you to stand with me to support this champion of women's health and reproductive rights by chipping in whatever you can to help Chris's team meet their goal before Wednesday's final FEC deadline.](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91a87/70cdc2ba/472c11ae/397bfcb/1139675358/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh-keep-fighting?refcode=em101716_2re&amount=25.00&recurring=12&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+Irsquom+asking+you+to+stand+with+me+to+s&utm_campaign=em101716_1&source=em101716_1")**
>
> Chris's opponent doesn't trust women to make their health care decisions. After Donald Trump's disgusting insults and attacks on women, she even continues to support him.
>
> We need to stand strong for champions like Chris, and reject those who would turn the clock back. I know that Chris Van Hollen will be a leader we can be proud of in the Senate. **[Please give $25 or whatever you can right now to help him get there.](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91a87/70cdc2ba/472c11ae/397bfc8/1139675358/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh-keep-fighting?refcode=em101716_2re&amount=25.00&recurring=12&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+Please+give+25+or+whatever+you+can+right&utm_campaign=em101716_1&source=em101716_1")**
>
> Less than four weeks to go -- please join me and let's get this done.
>
> Cecile Richards
> Planned Parenthood Federal PAC
> | ****[DONATE](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91a87/70cdc2ba/472c11ae/397bfc9/1139675358/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh-keep-fighting?refcode=em101716_2re&amount=25.00&recurring=12&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=3+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=em101716_1&source=em101716_1")****
> ---
>
>

Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
---

name: Lesley Robinson
subject: Outsiders
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greg for Montana, PO
body:
Greg for Montana

Watch our new ad

Friend,

Greg and I may seem like an
unlikely pair running for Governor and Lt. Governor. Together, we
joke that we're the farm team - with a little tech support.

I'm excited to show you our new
ad that we titled "Outsiders," because we're not like the career
politicians from Helena.

Can you help us keep it on the
air?

WATCH:

I'm running to bring a voice for
agriculture, rural Montana, and our local governments to Helena.
We're both running to create high wage jobs, restore
accountability, and ready our kids for the jobs of the future.
We're asking for your vote today
- and many of you should see your absentee ballots in the mail -
because the future of Montana is too important to let career
politicians continue their business as usual.

We have yet another important
finance deadline, tomorrow night at midnight. Please chip in
$15, $35, $75 or even $100 if you can.

Let's send 2 outsiders to Helena.

Thank you,

Lesley

Paid for by Greg for Montana, PO
Box 1557, Helena, MT, 59624, Republican

name: Justice for Governor
subject: You don't know Jim
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Justice for Governor
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/-2127929264110696448/2403938738490443776?refcode=home)
**An ad called 'Dad'**

Most West Virginians know Jim Justice from his success in the business world. The truth is that there is much more to Jim than just running The Greenbrier, coal companies, and his farming operation.

Anyone who knows him well will tell you that Jim is a family man, a coach, and someone who truly cares about all West Virginians.

Watch our latest TV ad starring Jim's daughter, Jill, and see another side of Jim. Jill shines a light on all the great things her dad does at home and in the community. Click below to watch:

[WATCH OUR LATEST AD: "Dad" ](https://act.myngp.com/el/-2127929264110696448/2475996332528371712?v=pKF-Hf5hdUk&feature=youtu.be)

Share this video so West Virginians can learn more about the real Jim Justice.

On to Victory,

body:
Take the Final Trump Debate Preparation Survey before 6 PM EST tomorrow. |

Friend, Tomorrow night is our FINAL debate against Hillary Clinton. But I can’t win it without your help. Please take the Final TRUMP Debate Preparation Survey by tomorrow at 6 PM EST to have a voice in our debate preparation strategy. This is our last opportunity to make the case for our presidential ticket on the national stage. A huge wave of early voting is about to take place in swing states across the country. Millions of undecided voters will tune in to tomorrow night’s debate to decide how to cast their vote for America’s next commander in chief. This is our chance to convince America that only our campaign has the policies, ideas, and leadership necessary to fix our country. But I need your help making sure that there isn’t a single issue that we have yet to address on the debate stage. We need to be certain that we’ve made the absolute best case to the American people that the Trump-Pence ticket is the right ticket for America. Please take the Final TRUMP Debate Preparation Survey by tomorrow at 6 PM EST. >> Thanks, Donald J. Trump TAKE SURVEY NOW

name: Team Murphy
subject: people are voting
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| |
---
| | [](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2da4/738133e4/329e766a/7f8560fc/3509214647/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme161018?refcode=pme161018_m&recur_weekly=true&amount=5")
---
| Ok, it's not _the_ Election Day. **But Floridians are already voting.** Over 485,000 so far.

**Friends -- we 're running out of time** to spread our message and earn votes. You can tell because our final FEC deadline of this election is in just 24 hours.

We have a little time to make a big impression. **And that "big impression" has to be reaching our $30,000 goal before this deadline hits.**

[_**Can you step up and give?**_](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2da4/738133e4/329e766a/7f8560fc/3509214647/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme161018?refcode=pme161018_m&recur_weekly=true&amount=5")

Our FEC numbers are a big deal for three reasons.

First: **Everyone will see them.** This race has come under a national spotlight because it could determine which party controls the U.S. Senate. The numbers we send in will make a huge statement about us.

Second: **We 're moving the needle in Patrick's direction.** _Real Clear Politics_ moved us into the "toss up" category. The latest Marist poll showed this race statistically tied. This is the time that can make or break this campaign, and we have to keep closing the gap.

Third: **We don 't just have to defeat Marco Rubio -- we have to defeat his special interest allies, too.** Doing that takes time and money.

We can't add more hours to the day. **But we can add more dollars to our bank account. And we have to do it before the FEC deadline tomorrow at midnight.**

[_**Step up with a contribution. Even $5 or $10 will help >>**_](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2da4/738133e4/329e766a/7f8560fc/3509214647/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme161018?refcode=pme161018_m&recur_weekly=true&amount=5")

Thanks,

Team Murphy |
Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida.com](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2da4/738133e4/329e766a/7f8560fd/3509214647/VEsC/ "http://murphyforflorida.com") This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
[Click here](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2da4/738133e4/329e766a/7f8560fe/3509214647/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/subscriptions/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") to unsubscribe

name: Michelle Obama
subject: No matter what
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 2
body:
Are you with me? | | Derek --

I am so proud to vote for Hillary -- and that would be true no matter who she were facing in this election.

She’s dedicated her life to public service. She’s been a tireless champion for kids and families. No matter how big the challenge or how daunting the task, she’s always been willing to roll up her sleeves and do what she can to help.

When times get tough, Hillary doesn’t back down, she just works harder. Every day she makes us all so proud.

So I’m going to keep on pouring everything I’ve got into making sure she becomes our next president, and I hope you’ll join me.

**Derek, if you’re with us, now’s the very best time to show it. This team is facing its final critical fundraising deadline tomorrow at midnight -- can you chip in $1 right now to show that you’re in Hillary’s corner? When you do, you’ll become a Presidential Donor, joining the team of supporters who came through at the most important moment.** | **You’re one of our most committed supporters. name: Team Portman
subject: MAJOR Endorsements
body:
| Peter --

The momentum is clearly behind Rob! He has recently received major endorsements across Ohio, including four unions and four newspapers that previously endorsed Ted, and most importantly, by thousands of voters across the state. We've contacted over 4.6 million voters, and we're working hard to surpass our goal of 5 million voter contacts before November 8th.

[](https://www.robportman.com/volunteer?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=graphic_endorse&n=1)
With 21 days until Election Day, we could use your help! Please [sign up to volunteer](https://www.robportman.com/volunteer?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=graphic_endorse&n=2) or [display a yard sign](https://www.robportman.com/yard_signs?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=graphic_endorse&n=3).

name: team@evanbayhforindiana.com
subject: Tonight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Evan Bayh Committee, 133 W
body:
| [ ](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a50584/7be36b49/1e61d3da/78f9e8c7/3894149341/VEsH/ "http://www.evanbayhforindiana.com/")
---
**TONIGHT: Evan debates Todd Young!** Friend -- Tonight, Evan will lay out his ideas for Indiana's future as he debates Congressman Todd Young.

**This is a chance for Evan to talk to the entire state, and we want to make sure he knows you 're with him. [Can we count on you to show Evan you've got his back by pitching in $5 now?](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a50584/7be36b49/1e61d3da/78f9e8c6/3894149341/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bayh-email?refcode=20161018.1nd&amount=10")**

**Evan 's vision for Indiana is clear. **He's an advocate for a strong middle class, working to create jobs and protecting our seniors by strengthening Social Security and Medicare. Evan believes in investing in education (he created Indiana's 21st Century Scholars program as governor), supporting our farmers, and working across the aisle to get it all done.

**But Congressman Young? He 's spent the last week answering for his history of skirting campaign rules and refusing to renounce Donald Trump** for his horrific comments about women. He's pushing for a higher Social Security retirement age, rewards for companies that outsource jobs, and partisan extremism over common-sense solutions.

**The choice is clear -- and we expect to see Evan at his best in tonight 's debate.** But before he goes on, we'd love to show him that he has the support of the Hoosier grassroots. **[Can we count on you to pitch in $5 before tonight?](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a50584/7be36b49/1e61d3da/78f9e8c6/3894149341/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bayh-email?refcode=20161018.1nd&amount=10")**

**With exactly three weeks until Election Day, the stakes have never been higher.**

Thanks for fighting with us,

Team Bayh ********[Contribute](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a50584/7be36b49/1e61d3da/78f9e8c5/3894149341/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bayh-email?refcode=20161018.1nd&amount=25")********
Paid for by the Evan Bayh Committee, 133 W. Market Street #153, Indianapolis, IN 46204

* * *

This email was sent to:
dpwillis67@gmail.com

[Unsubscribe](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a50584/7be36b49/1e61d3da/78f9e8c4/3894149341/VEsD/ "https://bayh.bsd.net/unsubscribe")
Contributions or gifts to the Evan Bayh Committee are not tax deductible.
---

name: Bill Cole
subject: A special request
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF COLE
body:
| | Friend -- There are only 21 more days until the biggest election in West Virginia’s history. It has been a tough race, and is likely to come down to a photo finish. But with so much on the line, we can’t afford to lose the momentum we have behind our campaign. And that is why it is so important that you get involved today. I am up against West Virginia’s only billionaire who is self-funding his campaign. I’ve got to have the resources to fight back. That is where you come in, Friend. I know times are tight, but **[I’m asking you to give any amount you can today to help keep my campaign going strong in the final three weeks.

](https://billcole.nationbuilder.com/bill_cole_donate?e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=10_18_1&n=1 "Donate Today")** You can support my campaign right now by clicking here: https://billcole.nationbuilder.com/bill_cole_donate I am committed to taking West Virginia from last to first, but **[I need your help if we’re going to cross the finish line first.](https://billcole.nationbuilder.com/bill_cole_donate?e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=10_18_1&n=2 "Donate Today")** Can I count on you today, Friend? clean_body: | | Friend -- There are only 21 more days until the biggest election in West Virginia’s history. It has been a tough race, and is likely to come down to a photo finish. But with so much on the line, we can’t afford to lose the momentum we have behind our campaign. And that is why it is so important that you get involved today. I am up against West Virginia’s only billionaire who is self-funding his campaign. I’ve got to have the resources to fight back. That is where you come in, Friend. I know times are tight, but "Donate Today" You can support my campaign right now by clicking here: I am committed to taking West Virginia from last to first, but "Donate Today" Can I count on you today, Friend? Thanks, Bill Cole. | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- | PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF COLE Friends of Bill Cole · United States

name: Jessica O'Connell
subject: Your help needed >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by EMILY's List [www
body:
| [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c0a03/24c69fd9/e7fce70/18eae63a/1467611876/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WPEFEV43N_digital_email_20161018_ThingsChange_n-all&source=WPEFEV43N_digital_email_20161018_ThingsChange_n-all")
---

| | Hi there,

The last weeks of an election are nothing short of intense.

Since the end of September, we've cheered on Hillary in two presidential debates, not to mention the more than 30 Senate, gubernatorial, and House debates our candidates have already participated in (with more to come). At the beginning of October, audio was leaked of Donald Trump bragging about sexual assault -- and many of our Republican opponents STILL support him.

A lot can happen in just a few days this late in the cycle. That's why it's so crucial to have the resources to pivot at any moment, whether there's a surprise attack on one of our candidates or we learn new information about an opponent.

**[Our last FEC deadline of this cycle is tomorrow, and we need to make sure our candidates have everything they need to make it through the last three weeks of this election. Donate $3 before midnight tomorrow to make sure they do.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c0a03/24c69fd9/e7fce70/18eae63b/1467611876/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20161016_email_FECdeadline?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Our+last+FEC+deadline+of+this+cycle+is+t&utm_campaign=WPEFEV43N_digital_email_20161018_ThingsChange_n-all&source=WPEFEV43N_digital_email_20161018_ThingsChange_n-all")**

Things will only get more hectic from here as our candidates continue to prep for debates and respond to attacks by Republicans.

Republican outside groups will continue to up their spending in states like Pennsylvania, New Hampshire, and Nevada, and it's crucial that our women have the funds to push back.

And those aren't the only things campaigns have to do right now. They also have to ramp up their get out the vote programs, keep their ads on the air, and talk to as many voters as they can.

Our help is crucial -- but the only way we can support all of our amazing candidates is if everyone chips in.

**Donate $3 before our last FEC deadline at midnight tomorrow to support our candidates in the final stretch:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Hit-Our-Wednesday-Goal](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c0a03/24c69fd9/e7fce70/18eae634/1467611876/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20161016_email_FECdeadline?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgHitOurWednesdayG&utm_campaign=WPEFEV43N_digital_email_20161018_ThingsChange_n-all&source=WPEFEV43N_digital_email_20161018_ThingsChange_n-all")**

Thank you,

Jess O'Connell
Executive Director, EMILY's List

[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c0a03/24c69fd9/e7fce70/18eae635/1467611876/VEsC/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20161016_email_FECdeadline?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=WPEFEV43N_digital_email_20161018_ThingsChange_n-all&source=WPEFEV43N_digital_email_20161018_ThingsChange_n-all")

|
---|---|---

name: Jay Inslee
subject: Our values matter -- so does the debate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
I'm preparing for my final debate.

Dear Friend,

Tomorrow, I'll be on stage for the final debate with my opponent in this race -- so I wanted to take a quick break from debate prep to let you know why tomorrow's so important.

There's going to be a lot more on the stage tomorrow than just the two of us -- our values, our vision, our belief in what Washington state is all about will be on that stage. And here's my pledge: I'm going to give it my all, because the stakes couldn't be any higher.

On stage will be a choice between a vision for Washington that lifts people up -- with good paying jobs, great schools, and a sense of community that welcomes people in -- versus a Washington that denies workers of good wages, that ignores our moral responsibility to fight climate change, and that doesn't welcome refugees.

At stake tomorrow is no less than the progress that you and I, together, have fought so hard to make a reality in Washington. So before I take the stage I hope you'll make a quick donation so I know you're standing with me, with our values, and with our progress.

http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=OTcxMjk3NQS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=2&j=MTAyMTQyODYzOQS2&mt=1&rt=0

I have an optimistic, progressive vision for Washington. We've come a long way together over the past four years -- but there's still work to be done.

>From job creation to protecting our environment, repairing our aging infrastructure and providing a 21st-century education for every child and student, the next four years are full of endless possibilities as we continue working together.

So tomorrow I'm going to talk about how we're building an economy that works for every Washington family. I'll talk about how we're leveling the playing field, bringing economic justice to workers who are the key to our economic success.

And I'll stand proud as we talk about the education system we're improving, the equal rights agenda we're pursuing, and the climate action we're taking.

I know my opponent will come after me with outrageous and false attacks -- and that's okay, I can take it. I can take it because you and I know these attacks are a substitute for any real vision on how to keep Washington moving forward.

That's why I'm grateful to know you and I share the same progressive vision and values for our state.

It's time to get back to debate prep -- thanks for reading, and thanks for standing with me.

http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=OTcxMjk3NQS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=2&j=MTAyMTQyODYzOQS2&mt=1&rt=0

Very truly yours,

Jay Inslee

CONTRIBUTE: http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=OTcxMjk3NQS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=2&j=MTAyMTQyODYzOQS2&mt=1&rt=0

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Click here to unsubscribe http://www.jayinslee.com/unsubscribe?m=9712975&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&j=MTAyMTQyODYzOQS2&l=5611360&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com.

Contributions or gifts to Jay Inslee for Washington are not tax deductible. All content (c) Jay Inslee for Washington, All Rights Reserved 2016.

PO Box 21067
Seattle, WA 98111

I'll talk about how we're leveling the playing field, bringing economic justice to workers who are the key to our economic success. And I'll stand proud as we talk about the education system we're improving, the equal rights agenda we're pursuing, and the climate action we're taking. I know my opponent will come after me with outrageous and false attacks -- and that's okay, I can take it. I can take it because you and I know these attacks are a substitute for any real vision on how to keep Washington moving forward. That's why I'm grateful to know you and I share the same progressive vision and values for our state. It's time to get back to debate prep -- thanks for reading, and thanks for standing with me. Very truly yours, Jay Inslee CONTRIBUTE:

I know that Chris Van Hollen will be a leader we can be proud of in the Senate. **[Please give $25 or whatever you can right now to help him get there.](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91a83/70cdc2ba/472b4342/397be1e/1655293864/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh-keep-fighting?refcode=em101816&amount=25.00&recurring=12&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=3+-+Please+give+25+or+whatever+you+can+right&utm_campaign=em101816_1&source=em101816_1")**

---|---
| **_IN CASE YOU MISSED IT_**

**MINTER ADS CONTINUE TO MISLEAD VOTERS**
Middlesex, Vt. -- _Seven Days_ recently revealed multiple inconsistencies in an ad Sue Minter has been running to attack Phil Scott’s legislative record.

“Sue Minter must be very concerned her campaign is falling behind because she has been consistently and intentionally misleading Vermonters about Phil Scott. As her campaign continues to flounder, we expect her attacks, and the attacks by her surrogates, to become even more desperate and more dishonest,” said Scott campaign spokeswoman Brittney Wilson. “Growing the economy and making Vermont more affordable are Phil’s top priorities. If an idea makes Vermont more affordable and keeps our budget in line with what Vermonters can afford, he will support it. If it makes Vermont less affordable or taxes already overburdened Vermonters, Phil will oppose it. Period.”

**But here’s the truth Minter doesn’t tell:** In 2009, Phil Scott was fighting against Sue Minter’s 5-cent per gallon gas tax, and for a bill that would be revenue neutral. In fact, the Minter version had a 5-cent-per-gallon tax increase that was supported by Minter’s Appropriations Committee, reported on by Minter, and voted “yes” on by Minter. Phil Scott fought to ditch this tax increase, but ultimately had to compromise as a member of the minority.

“The major difference between now and then is this: in the Legislature Phil didn’t have a veto pen,” Wilson said. “But he will as Governor.”

**Here’s what Seven Days reported:**

“The _real_ whopper in this ad is Minter's criticism of Scott's 2009 vote to raise the gas tax. It's a whopper because Minter voted for the _same_ bill — and, earlier in the legislative process, she voted to raise the gas tax _even higher_ than Scott did.

“At the time, **_Minter was serving in the Vermont House and Scott in the Senate. In early April, the House _**_**voted to raise the tax on gasoline and diesel by five cents per gallon**_. That proposal also tied the gas tax to inflation. Minter, then a member of the House Appropriations Committee, supported the bill and stood up on the House floor to explain her vote...** _Asked three times Monday afternoon whether it was hypocritical for her to criticize Scott over a tax she tried to raise even higher, Minter would not say._** ”

To read the full article, [_click here_](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=f2ccc8c3ef&e=19cebfe173)
###

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jodylynn=20Tedford?=
subject: Fwd: Tom Brady getting a rousing cheer at CenturyLink Field
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Washingtonians for Bryant (R)
body:
|
---
| | Friend

Did you see this Seattle Times article from this weekend?

_"Here’s how angry the overflow crowd was at a Seattle City Hall hearing on homeless camping policies: Republican candidate for governor Bill Bryant received an ovation for declaring there should be zero tolerance for camping on public property._ **_That’s akin to Tom Brady getting a rousing cheer at CenturyLink Field."_**

I wanted to put it at the top of your inbox – the fact that Bill can get a standing ovation in deep blue Seattle reinforces something we’ve been experiencing throughout the campaign: Bill’s message resonates with everyone, we just need to get it in front of voters.

That takes resources. It takes door knocks and phone calls and a massive statewide Get Out The Vote effort. We have offices in every area and they need the resources to meet their goals.

[**_Can you send us $35, $75, $150, or more right now so we can reach more voters?_**](http://billbryantforgovernor.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a508ffc703e6fc82360a383e8&id=567e756b03&e=32f1a3df98) [** ****GET OUR MESSAGE OUT **](http://billbryantforgovernor.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a508ffc703e6fc82360a383e8&id=a2130d3159&e=32f1a3df98)
Thank you for your ongoing support!

**JodyLynn Tedford**
Finance Director
Bill Bryant for Governor
(253)220-5051
---
| |
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Bill Bryant
Date: Sat, Oct 15, 2016 at 1:05 PM
Subject: Tom Brady getting a rousing cheer at CenturyLink Field
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com

Friend

Yesterday [I addressed the Seattle City Council](http://billbryantforgovernor.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a508ffc703e6fc82360a383e8&id=d8d943a1f0&e=32f1a3df98) on their proposed ordinance to allow people experiencing homelessness to camp in our children's parks and on 167 miles of city sidewalks - **a proposal I firmly oppose.**

The [Seattle Times was there](http://billbryantforgovernor.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a508ffc703e6fc82360a383e8&id=4dcbc04a54&e=32f1a3df98) and opened their article as such: _"Here’s how angry the overflow crowd was at a Seattle City Hall hearing on homeless camping policies: Republican candidate for governor Bill Bryant received an ovation for declaring there should be zero tolerance for camping on public property._ _That’s akin to Tom Brady getting a rousing cheer at CenturyLink Field."_

**Go ahead and read that again.

Our message is resonating with voters throughout our state and across party lines**. Now all we need is your help. This week [I released my second ad for the General Election](http://billbryantforgovernor.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a508ffc703e6fc82360a383e8&id=14e3a0658b&e=32f1a3df98), an ad focused on addressing mental health and homelessness. Will you help me keep this ad running on television and online by [rushing us a $25, $75, or $150 contribution](http://billbryantforgovernor.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a508ffc703e6fc82360a383e8&id=bc6470b9ae&e=32f1a3df98)? Our message is working, we're winning over people no one thought we would, and with your support I know we can win in November.

**Bill Bryant**
---

PO Box 2121, Tacoma, WA 98401

Friend, Did you see this headline on Drudge? Trump Sets Republican Record for Individual Donors... More Americans have contributed to our campaign than to ANY Republican candidate in history. But with your help right now, we can take that record to the next level... Let’s beat the individual donor record not just for Republicans -- but for ALL political campaigns in American history. All I’m asking you to do is contribute any amount you can -- $1, $5, $25, $50, $100, $200 -- to help us set a new fundraising record for the most individual donors in American political history. But we need to do it before the FINAL FEC deadline of our ENTIRE campaign TOMORROW at 11:59 PM. Can I count on your contribution? Please make a contribution of $100, $50, $25 to help us set a record in American political history before the FINAL FEC-mandated deadline. This is our last chance to send a powerful message that Hillary’s special interest and lobbyist machine are NO MATCH for the grassroots of America. And what better way to do it than by showing that more individual Americans contributed to our campaign than to ANY other in American political history. Please contribute before the FINAL FEC deadline of the ENTIRE election to help us set this ambitious record. Thanks, Katrina Pierson CONTRIBUTE $100

name: Barack Obama
subject: Putting Katie on the Senate floor
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/-5807626868953710592/8867332579594862592?refcode=e20161018.2&refcode2=e20161018.2nd&amount=25)
---
Friends --

History is made on the Senate floor, but it's people like you who decide who stands there.

That's why I'm asking you to support my friend, Katie McGinty. I know that she's the best person to fight for Pennsylvania's working families -- but with the polls in a dead heat right now, special interests are spending BIG money to protect Pat Toomey.

[**Will you join me in showing Katie we 've got her back? Quick, pitch in $5 today to send Katie to the Senate floor to stand tough for Pennsylvania's working families.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-5807626868953710592/8867332579594862592?refcode=e20161018.2&refcode2=e20161018.2nd&amount=25)

Throughout her career, Katie has proven she can get things done. She created jobs in Pennsylvania, and spent decades protecting the clean air and water around us. Katie worked closely with my own administration to implement the Affordable Care Act and expand Medicaid coverage to more than 600,000 Pennsylvanians. That's a job well done.

But here's what worries me: If we lose in Pennsylvania, it paves the way for another Republican Senate majority bent on dismantling everything we've worked so hard to build.

Look, when I first stepped into the White House, I knew that it was the grassroots donors behind my campaign who helped put me there. Now Katie is looking to her team -- you -- to do the same.

[**We need to give it our all. Chip in today to help Katie win:**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-5807626868953710592/8867332579594862592?refcode=e20161018.2&refcode2=e20161018.2nd&amount=25)

[**www.katiemcginty.com/donate**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-5807626868953710592/8867332579594862592?refcode=e20161018.2&refcode2=e20161018.2nd&amount=25)

There are just 21 days left until Election Day. What we do together in that short amount of time will win or lose this race -- so let's get to work.

Thank you,

Barack Obama

| *** A note on donations ***

There are only 21 days left in this race, and the polls are in a virtual tie. Katie is fighting for working families in PA -- but we're up against major special interest spending. Can you make a grassroots donation today to help Katie win this race and take back the Senate?
**Chip in $5 today. Thank you.**

**[Donate Now](https://act.myngp.com/el/-5807626868953710592/8867332579594862592?refcode=e20161018.2&refcode2=e20161018.2nd&amount=25)**

clean_body: Friends -- History is made on the Senate floor, but it's people like you who decide who stands there. That's why I'm asking you to support my friend, Katie McGinty. I know that she's the best person to fight for Pennsylvania's working families -- but with the polls in a dead heat right now, special interests are spending BIG money to protect Pat Toomey. Throughout her career, Katie has proven she can get things done. She created jobs in Pennsylvania, and spent decades protecting the clean air and water around us. Katie worked closely with my own administration to implement the Affordable Care Act and expand Medicaid coverage to more than 600,000 Pennsylvanians. That's a job well done. But here's what worries me: If we lose in Pennsylvania, it paves the way for another Republican Senate majority bent on dismantling everything we've worked so hard to build. Look, when I first stepped into the White House, I knew that it was the grassroots donors behind my campaign who helped put me there. Now Katie is looking to her team -- you -- to do the same. There are just 21 days left until Election Day. What we do together in that short amount of time will win or lose this race -- so let's get to work. Thank you, Barack Obama | * A note on donations There are only 21 days left in this race, and the polls are in a virtual tie. Katie is fighting for working families in PA -- but we're up against major special interest spending. Can you make a grassroots donation today to help Katie win this race and take back the Senate? Chip in $5 today. Thank you. ** | | Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate

name: BernieSanders.com
subject: Listen to Paul Ryan
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Bernie Sanders
body:
#
Sisters and Brothers,
Republican Speaker of the House Paul Ryan issued a very dire warning this week. You need to see it:
* * *
**_"If we lose the Senate, do you know who becomes chair of the Senate Budget Committee? A guy named Bernie Sanders. You ever heard of him?"_**
* * *
You heard the man. Let's take back the Senate.
Four of our best opportunities to take back the Senate are in Nevada, New Hampshire, North Carolina, and Pennsylvania. Each race is incredibly close. But if the Democratic nominees win, we will have a far more progressive Senate - and a majority to enact our progressive agenda.
[**The final FEC fundraising deadline of the campaign is Wednesday at midnight. Split a $4 contribution now between Catherine Cortez Masto, Maggie Hassan, Deborah Ross, and Katie McGinty before tomorrow's deadline.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/progressive-senate?refcode=em161018-full-s "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/progressive-senate?refcode=em161018-full-s")
How close are these races? The latest poll averages have Deborah Ross down by just two points in North Carolina. In Nevada, Catherine Cortez Masto is up by two. Maggie Hassan is down by a little more than two points in New Hampshire. And in the tightest race of all, Katie McGinty is up by less than a half percent in Pennsylvania.
Four Senate seats we need for a majority. Four dedicated leaders who could serve with Bernie Sanders. At most a two percent difference in the polls for every race.
Your contributions can be the difference between victory and defeat in each of these elections. Small-dollar contributions from emails like this can push Catherine Cortez Masto, Deborah Ross, Maggie Hassan, and Katie McGinty over the top on election day.
With tomorrow's FINAL fundraising deadline for the FEC, the time is now for us to step up and help take back a Senate majority.
[**Split a $4 contribution between the campaigns of Catherine Cortez Masto, Deborah Ross, Maggie Hassan, and Katie McGinty before tomorrow's deadline.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/progressive-senate?refcode=em161018-full-s "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/progressive-senate?refcode=em161018-full-s")
You can make the difference in this election to take back a Senate majority. Thank you.
In solidarity,
Jeff Weaver
Team Bernie
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/progressive-senate?refcode=em161018-full-s "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/progressive-senate?refcode=em161018-full-s")**

Paid for by Friends of Bernie Sanders
PO BOX 391, Burlington, VT 05402
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/").

name: Bullock HQ
subject: Fwd: I just want to say:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Steve Bullock - Democrat, P
body:
---
Friend,

Did you have a chance to read Steve's note below yet? Let's make this final major financial deadline our most successful grassroots fundraising period yet.

**Help us hit this final goal.** We're $1,763 short. **[Kick in $15.](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=6BU401E0aj4k9Xg1lsylYbqaBkJLAcRD)**

Thanks,

Bullock HQ

\--- Original Message ---
From: Steve Bullock
Subject: I just want to say:

Friend,

I can't tell you how much I'm looking forward to not bombarding you with fundraising emails all the time.

But **we 're continuing to get hugely outspent in this campaign**. We're just three weeks from Election Day and thousands of Montanans have already started voting. **[Will you chip in $15?](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=kptBEo%2Bs5AUK6vmkR6PdtD1uEZzhXbZf)**

Right now, my opponent is using his millions to try to paint a picture of Montana that just isn't true. **He's trying to tear down our state to make the case for his candidacy** \-- when in reality unemployment is down, wages are up and more people are working than ever before.

**Tomorrow at midnight is the last big fundraising deadline before the election.** I'm asking you to help send a message that Montana is not a place where millionaires can just pump money into peddling misleading information to buy the governor's office.

I want to say again how much I appreciate the outpouring of support. Quite frankly, I'm amazed by the number of grassroots online donations we've seen over the course of this campaign. **But right now we 're still $2,087 away from our goal -- [will you make one more contribution of $15?](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=8t1Q%2B3qoz2bq98hntAJfSrqaBkJLAcRD)**

Thanks so much,
Steve Bullock ****
---
| [**DONATE**](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=XiUJuGfMpnc15vn%2FqLOcpz1uEZzhXbZf)
---

---

Friends of Steve Bullock
Post Office Box 1330
Helena MT 59624 United States

Here it is, Friend -- John McCain was caught saying what will happen if the GOP keeps the Senate and Hillary wins the presidency...

**"I promise you that we will be united against any Supreme Court nominee that Hillary Clinton, if she were president, would put up. I promise you. "**
Mitch McConnell insisted for MONTHS that he can't confirm President Obama's nominee based on principle. Now the truth is out -- the GOP won't confirm ANY nominee a Democrat makes.

**That makes taking back the Senate more important than ever, but the _New York Times_ puts our odds at 50/50! Can you help with any gift before our final FEC deadline? (Only 36 hours left)**

[Or donate another amount.](https://secure.dscc. Now that Republicans have confirmed their plans, we can't sit back and hope for the best. If we don't act, they'll get the chance to undo President Obama's legacy and undercut Hillary Clinton's agenda on Day One.

And with the race to take back the Senate so close, every gift matters. [**Please, pitch in whatever you can right now >>**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab?refcode=DPE-20161018-Alert_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

Team DSCC

120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
