body:
Tonight is the final debate of this race. So, when I take the debate stage can I count on you to have my back?
Tonight is the final debate of this race. So, when I take the debate stage can I count on you to have my back?
|
[](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/12025f6/2fde7c66/4331b636/156ad871/722460401/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cooper-finaldebate?utm_campaign=fnd_debate_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&refcode=em16_161018_fnd_gq_debate_ful__rc&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")
---
Friends, Tonight is the final debate of this race. The past two times I have faced Governor McCrory, the differences between us have been clear. While I focused on my priorities for our state -- investing in public education and raising up the middle class, the governor spent his time protecting his discriminatory law and calling Donald Trump a role model. **So, when I take the debate stage can I count on you to have my back?** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**$5 »**](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/12025f6/2fde7c66/4331b636/156ad870/722460401/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cooper-finaldebate?utm_campaign=fnd_debate_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&refcode=em16_161018_fnd_gq_debate_ful__rc&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&express_lane=true&amount=5")

Our incredible grassroots support is what has gotten us this far. With only 21 days left until Election Day and just TWO days until early voting begins, we can't afford to let up now.
**[Chip in now and let me know that you have my back before tonight's debate.](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/12025f6/2fde7c66/4331b636/156ad871/722460401/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cooper-finaldebate?utm_campaign=fnd_debate_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&refcode=em16_161018_fnd_gq_debate_ful__rc&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")**

Roy

name: Paul Tencher
subject: Just hours from now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Evan Bayh Committee, 133 W
body:
| [ ](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a5058b/7be36b49/1e6f8342/78f9ec76/1008465184/VEsH/ "http://www.evanbayhforindiana.com/")
---
Friend -- Just hours from now, Evan will take the stage for the big debate.

**[Before he goes on, I want to show him Hoosiers have his back -- will you pitch in $5 now?](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a5058b/7be36b49/1e6f8342/78f9ec75/1008465184/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bayh-email?refcode=20161018.2nd&amount=10")**

This debate is a huge moment, but you can't forget about everything else going on:
* **A new poll from Monmouth University shows Evan with a "small lead" **
* But out-of-state special interests are ALL IN to defeat Evan, who they know will be an independent voice, not a lackey
* And today marks just three weeks until Election Day

So friend, we don't have much time to take Evan's lead and turn it into a win. Tonight's debate is a great opportunity to seize the momentum -- if Hoosiers take advantage of it.

**[Will you pitch in $5 now to give Evan a boost and show him how many Hoosiers are on his side?](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a5058b/7be36b49/1e6f8342/78f9ec75/1008465184/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bayh-email?refcode=20161018.2nd&amount=10")**

Thank you,

Paul Tencher
Campaign Manager
P.S. The debate starts at 7 tonight. Click **[here](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a5058b/7be36b49/1e6f8342/78f9ec74/1008465184/VEsC/ "http://indianadebatecommission.com/where-to-watch/")** to find out where to watch. I hope you'll tune in! ********[Contribute](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a5058b/7be36b49/1e6f8342/78f9ec7b/1008465184/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bayh-email?refcode=20161018.2nd&amount=25")********
Paid for by the Evan Bayh Committee, 133 W. Market Street #153, Indianapolis, IN 46204

* * *

This email was sent to:
dpwillis67@gmail.com

[Unsubscribe](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a5058b/7be36b49/1e6f8342/78f9ec7a/1008465184/VEsA/ "https://bayh.bsd.net/unsubscribe")
Contributions or gifts to the Evan Bayh Committee are not tax deductible.

subject: not a week goes by
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
It's been exciting to see that in an elected leader at a time when so many Americans feel out of touch with their government. We are lucky here in Maryland. |
[](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91a81/70cdc2ba/472bce04/397bc61/3716601690/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh-keep-fighting?refcode=em092816_2&amount=25.00&recurring=12&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=em101816_2&source=em101816_2") Friend, not a week goes by when I don't meet a volunteer or visitor to our office who stops by my desk to tell me stories about how Chris Van Hollen helped a family member, a friend, or touched their lives in some other way.

It's pretty obvious that Chris cares about those he represents and he works hard to try to help as many people as he can. It's been exciting to see that in an elected leader at a time when so many Americans feel out of touch with their government. We are lucky here in Maryland.

That's why I am asking you to help us finish this job and elect Chris to be Maryland's next United States Senator. We still have a lot of work to do between now and Election Day to reach Marylanders who still have not focused on this Senate campaign. In the end this election will be decided by the people who come out to vote -- and we need to get that vote out!

[**Will you help out by making a donation of $25 or whatever you can before tonight 's critical FEC deadline?**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91a81/70cdc2ba/472bce04/397bc7e/3716601690/VEsE/ name: Chuck
subject: I don't think you saw Bill's email
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF COLE
body:
| | Friend,

Bill is busy travelling in southern WV today speaking with voters so he asked for me to follow up with his email from this morning. I want to be sure you didn’t miss his note. It really is very important for you to read his message, and take to take action. We only have three weeks left until Election Day, and your support is crucial if we are going to best Jim Justice on November 8th.

[](https://billcole.nationbuilder.com/bill_cole_donate?e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=10_18_fwd&n=1 "Donate")

Thanks,

Chuck Flannery
Campaign Manager | Cole for Governor

\---------- Forwarded message \----------
From: **Bill Cole** <billcole@billcoleforwv.com>
Date: Tue, Oct 18, 2016 at 11:47 AM
Subject: A special request
To: Chuck Flannery <chuck@billcoleforgovernor.com>

Chuck There are only 21 more days until the biggest election in West Virginia’s history. It has been a tough race, and is likely to come down to a photo finish. But with so much on the line, we can’t afford to lose the momentum we have behind our campaign. And that is why it is so important that you get involved today. I am up against West Virginia’s only billionaire who is self-funding his campaign. I’ve got to have the resources to fight back. That is where you come in, Chuck. I know times are tight, but **[I’m asking you to give any amount you can today to help keep my campaign going strong in the final three weeks.

](https://billcole.nationbuilder.com/bill_cole_donate?e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=10_18_fwd&n=2 "Donate Today")** You can support my campaign right now by clicking here: https://billcole.nationbuilder.com/bill_cole_donate I am committed to taking West Virginia from last to first, but **[I need your help if we’re going to cross the finish line first.](https://billcole.nationbuilder.com/bill_cole_donate?e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=10_18_fwd&n=3 "Donate Today")** Can I count on you today, Chuck? Thanks, Bill Cole.

---
---
| | [](https://billcole.nationbuilder.com/donate?e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=10_18_fwd&n=4)

name: Trump Team Virginia
subject: There is no time to waste Sign up to get involved NOW!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donald J
body:
Peter --

The days and hours are growing short. We are quickly approaching the most important and historic election of our lifetime. What happens on November 8th will shape the direction of our Country for over a decade. Make a difference now before it is too late.
[Click here to sign up to volunteer this weekend.](https://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Furldefense.proofpoint.com%2Fv2%2Furl%3Fu%3Dhttps-3A__donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com_r-3Fu-3Dhttps-253A-252F-252Furldefense.proofpoint.com-252Fv2-252Furl-253Fu-253Dhttps-2D3A-5F-5Ftrumpvaweekend.eventbrite.com-5F-2526d-253DDQMFAg-2526c-253Decx-5FOy7LFev-2D5AZZypfA9UpMsuBfoOoTkgGzbwCI-2Ds8-2526r-253DG-5FFdiwLmlRqakhhsKYsiN1pz9uYNyRUklhAevojqZRw-2526m-253DSNmpFZ8Mdmwlvt9amm62DBdlieQnLnndarktanij-5FUI-2526s-253DngSTdVIUnFlw3zimWtHoS80f1q-2DXycSTOuQrm-5FqOjlQ-2526e-253D-26e-3D59344abb3cc5a27d6398ff61009431f7-26utm-5Fsource-3Ddonaldtrump-26utm-5Fmedium-3Demail-26utm-5Fcampaign-3Dvagotv2-26n-3D1-26test-5Femail-3D1%26d%3DDQMFaQ%26c%3Decx_Oy7LFev-5AZZypfA9UpMsuBfoOoTkgGzbwCI-s8%26r%3DG_FdiwLmlRqakhhsKYsiN1pz9uYNyRUklhAevojqZRw%26m%3Dblxv2ogv8yu6JhBl7g2fm0C8gkaOvBm-6S5x_MVgN70%26s%3DibEuhXooSC9b6kXGv70y-_gPzNfuNZOFRfNJBJxW9rw%26e%3D&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=vagotv5&n=1)

body:
Peter,

Eric's Mission for Missouri Bus Tour is making its way across the state this weekend.

There are less than three weeks left until the election, and Eric wants to make sure he is hearing from all Missourians. [Join us at one of the events this weekend ](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=2e7086b235&e=84041254e6)and hear Eric discuss his plan to take Missouri in a new direction, away from crooked career politicians like Chris Koster.

5:30 pm

Jefferson City, MO 65101

subject: Robby gave me an update last night

body:
It's inspiring to see such concrete proof | | Derek --

Last night, Robby called to give me an update, and he happened to mention that over 241,770 people had stepped up to become Presidential Donors -- showing they're standing with this team during our final push.

That means so much to me, Derek.

This really isn’t about the money -- though of course, that's important. I just want you to know that it's inspiring to see such concrete proof of the way this team has my back before I take the debate stage tomorrow night -- and before we reach our final, big FEC deadline.

| Hey -- What a moment in our campaign! Last night's debate was a clear victory for Patrick. And today, a second recent poll is out showing us within two points! "Rubio leading Murphy by a scant 49-47-point margin," the _Miami New Times_ reports. This is a statistical tie!

[**But we have our final FEC deadline of this election tomorrow at midnight -- will you contribute now to help us meet our goal and pull ahead?**](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2da2/738133e4/3296d59e/7f856006/2565628751/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme161018pm2?refcode=pme161018pm2_m&recur_weekly=true&amount=10") | [](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2da2/738133e4/3296d59e/7f856006/2565628751/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme161018pm2?refcode=pme161018pm2_m&recur_weekly=true&amount=10")
---
Marco Rubio struggled to defend his support of Donald Trump last night. He's let his "lead tumble from his grasp"! All while right-wing billionaires continue to outspend us by huge amounts -- we're within the margin of error in this new poll! We can build on our momentum, win this race, and turn the Senate blue -- but we need your help. [**Chip in before our final FEC deadline in just 24 hours >>**](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2da2/738133e4/3296d59e/7f856007/2565628751/VEsC/ "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme161018pm2?refcode=pme161018pm2_m&recur_weekly=true&amount=10")

subject: Derek, I’m asking you:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 2
body:
What this is all about | | Derek, we know in our hearts what this election means -- it’s not about Democrats versus Republicans.

It’s about whether, in this difficult moment, we’ll discard our highest ideals -- or rise up to meet them.

**With just one day until the final major fundraising deadline of this campaign, I’m personally asking you to step up for the first time and become a Presidential Donor before midnight tomorrow. The campaign will even send you a free sticker so you can show off your support with pride.** | **You’re one of our most committed supporters. If you've saved your payment information, your donation will go through immediately:
** | **[**Derek, donate now: $1**](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjY4MjQ1MDUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTAzMjcyNTI0S0&mt=1&rt=0) **

**[**Derek, donate now: $50**](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=18&ms=MjY4MjQ1MDUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTAzMjcyNTI0S0&mt=1&rt=0)**
**
Together, we can stand up for the values we share and the future we want for our children.

Thank you,

Michelle

**We're in the final stretch of this election -- chip in $1 to show Hillary you're ready to win:**
